Title: Ted
Writer: Seth MacFarlane, Alec Sulkin, Wellesley Wild
Actors: Mark Wahlberg, Mila Kunis, Seth MacFarlane
Plot: John makes a Christmas miracle happen by bringing his one and only friend to life, his teddy bear. The two grow up together and John must then choose to stay with his girlfriend or keep his friendship with his crude and extremely inappropriate teddy bear, Ted.
Awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 13 wins & 28 nominations total
